summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Nasdaq-100 Premium Income ETF (GPIQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that primarily involves stocks within the Nasdaq-100. Combining equity investments with a call strategy, the fund seeks to generate stable income while offering potential for capital growth GPIQ was launched on Oct 24, 2023 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.

holdings.infoBox: GPIQ is an equity ETF with a total of 109 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.09%, Apple at 7.68%, Amazon.com at 4.53%, Micron Technology at 4.41%, and Microsoft at 4.31%.
